chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1325 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 7299/24 3.For hearing of main case 08-04-2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Pirzada, Advocate along with Sohail, son of petitioner. Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for respondents No.3&4. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant P.G. **** Counsel for respondents No.3&4 files statements together with original cheque of Rs.200,000/- dated 09.04.2025 in the name of petitioner, which is handed over to her son after obtaining proper acknowledgment receipt. He further submits that remaining differential amount of salaries would be paid to the petitioner in equal installments of Rs.50,000/- per month along with regular monthly pension. After such statement, counsel for petitioner while expressing his satisfaction seeks disposal of instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
